mapper.sql: ID, STOCK_CODE, STOCK_NAME, TYPE_CODE, TYPE_NAME, MARKET, SECURITIES, BANK, `DATE`, SETTLEMENT, SETTLEMENT_DAY, ESTABLISHED, LISTED, STOCK_PRICE, TRADING_UNIT, TOTAL_ZIKA, DIVIDEND, EXPECTED_DIVIDEND, FIXED_DIVIDEND, PER, EPS, PBR, ROE, ROA, PREFERENTIAL_FLG, DIVIDEND_FLG, ICHIMOKU_UPPER_FLG, ICHIMOKU_DOWLOAD_FLG, DEL_FLG, HOMEPAGE, NEWS_URL, IR_URL, TEKUSYOKU, RENKETU_ZIGYO, SUPPLIER, SALES_DESTINATION
mapper.select: SELECT CODE_KEY, CODE_VALUE FROM M_CODE WHERE CODE_TYPE = 'INDUSTRY' ORDER BY CODE_KEY ASC

SELECT MS.STOCK_CODE, MS.STOCK_NAME, MS.STOCK_PRICE AS CURRENT_PRICE_TEXT, LATEST.TRANS_DATE AS REFERENCE_DATE, LATEST.CLOSE_PRICE AS REFERENCE_CLOSE_PRICE FROM M_STOCK MS LEFT JOIN M_STOCK_PRICE_HISTORY LATEST ON LATEST.STOCK_CODE = MS.STOCK_CODE AND LATEST.TRANS_DATE = ( SELECT MAX(H2.TRANS_DATE) FROM M_STOCK_PRICE_HISTORY H2 WHERE H2.STOCK_CODE = MS.STOCK_CODE AND H2.CLOSE_PRICE IS NOT NULL ) WHERE MS.STOCK_CODE = #{stockCode}

SELECT SF.ID, SF.STOCK_CODE, MS.STOCK_NAME, MS.TYPE_NAME, MS.MARKET, MS.STOCK_PRICE, SF.CREATED_AT FROM M_STOCK_FAVORITE SF LEFT JOIN M_STOCK MS ON SF.STOCK_CODE = MS.STOCK_CODE ORDER BY SF.CREATED_AT DESC, SF.ID DESC
SELECT SF.ID, SF.STOCK_CODE, MS.STOCK_NAME, MS.TYPE_NAME, MS.MARKET, MS.STOCK_PRICE, SF.CREATED_AT FROM M_STOCK_FAVORITE SF LEFT JOIN M_STOCK MS ON SF.STOCK_CODE = MS.STOCK_CODE WHERE SF.ID = #{id}

SELECT SF.ID, SF.STOCK_CODE, MS.STOCK_NAME, MS.TYPE_NAME, MS.MARKET, MS.STOCK_PRICE, SF.CREATED_AT FROM M_STOCK_FAVORITE SF LEFT JOIN M_STOCK MS ON SF.STOCK_CODE = MS.STOCK_CODE WHERE SF.STOCK_CODE = #{stockCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_STOCK ( STOCK_CODE, STOCK_NAME, TYPE_CODE, TYPE_NAME, MARKET, SECURITIES, BANK, `DATE`, SETTLEMENT, SETTLEMENT_DAY, ESTABLISHED, LISTED, STOCK_PRICE, TRADING_UNIT, TOTAL_ZIKA, DIVIDEND, EXPECTED_DIVIDEND, FIXED_DIVIDEND, PER, EPS, PBR, ROE, ROA, PREFERENTIAL_FLG, DIVIDEND_FLG, ICHIMOKU_UPPER_FLG, ICHIMOKU_DOWLOAD_FLG, DEL_FLG, HOMEPAGE, NEWS_URL, IR_URL, TEKUSYOKU, RENKETU_ZIGYO, SUPPLIER, SALES_DESTINATION ) VALUES ( #{stockCode}, #{stockName}, #{typeCode}, #{typeName}, #{market}, #{securities}, #{bank}, #{date}, #{settlement}, #{settlementDay}, #{established}, #{listed}, #{stockPrice}, #{tradingUnit}, #{totalZika}, #{dividend}, #{expectedDividend}, #{fixedDividend}, #{per}, #{eps}, #{pbr}, #{roe}, #{roa}, #{preferentialFlg}, #{dividendFlg}, #{ichimokuUpperFlg}, #{ichimokuDowloadFlg}, #{delFlg}, #{homepage}, #{newsUrl}, #{irUrl}, #{tekusyoku}, #{renketuZigyo}, #{supplier}, #{salesDestination} )
mapper.update: UPDATE M_STOCK SET STOCK_CODE = #{stockCode}, STOCK_NAME = #{stockName}, TYPE_CODE = #{typeCode}, TYPE_NAME = #{typeName}, MARKET = #{market}, SECURITIES = #{securities}, BANK = #{bank}, `DATE` = #{date}, SETTLEMENT = #{settlement}, SETTLEMENT_DAY = #{settlementDay}, ESTABLISHED = #{established}, LISTED = #{listed}, STOCK_PRICE = #{stockPrice}, TRADING_UNIT = #{tradingUnit}, TOTAL_ZIKA = #{totalZika}, DIVIDEND = #{dividend}, EXPECTED_DIVIDEND = #{expectedDividend}, FIXED_DIVIDEND = #{fixedDividend}, PER = #{per}, EPS = #{eps}, PBR = #{pbr}, ROE = #{roe}, ROA = #{roa}, PREFERENTIAL_FLG = #{preferentialFlg}, DIVIDEND_FLG = #{dividendFlg}, ICHIMOKU_UPPER_FLG = #{ichimokuUpperFlg}, ICHIMOKU_DOWLOAD_FLG = #{ichimokuDowloadFlg}, DEL_FLG = #{delFlg}, HOMEPAGE = #{homepage}, NEWS_URL = #{newsUrl}, IR_URL = #{irUrl}, TEKUSYOKU = #{tekusyoku}, RENKETU_ZIGYO = #{renketuZigyo}, SUPPLIER = #{supplier}, SALES_DESTINATION = #{salesDestination} WHERE ID = #{id}
